title: subitems need to be visible in the phone app on calendar view
excerpt:
Description
currently you can’t see subitems in the calendar view in the phone app. This is an issue as we are trying to use subitems to track repeat site visits and staff can’t see where they are working each day in the…

posts.author: Bertman23 (Robert)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

currently you can’t see subitems in the calendar view in the phone app. This is an issue as we are trying to use subitems to track repeat site visits and staff can’t see where they are working each day in the calendar view which is the easiest way for us to visualise the upcoming jobs.

What are you trying to achieve

I want have subitems visible in the calendar view as they are on the web app on my desktop and the same way the staff view the main items.

posts.author: WorkOSMods (O.Williams)
posts.cookedHtml: We also rely on subitems for daily tasks, and not seeing them in the mobile calendar makes it hard for the team to plan their days

posts.author: reinier (Reinier ― 📅 Calendar Plus 🍅 Automato)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Bertman23, @WorkOSMods,

Upvoted your feature request!

If you’re open to using apps, you can try Calendar Plus.
